name: After-Hours System Access
description: Alert on logins occurring outside business hours (18:00-06:00)
query:
// After-Hours Access Detection
// Logins outside business hours
events from authentication
where event_type = "authentication_success"
  and (hour(timestamp) >= 18 or hour(timestamp) < 6)
group by username, source_ip
having count(*) >= 1
within 300 seconds
